title: Microgramma heterophylla
taxonomy: Microgramma heterophylla is classified as a species of fern in the family Polypodiaceae. It belongs to the genus Microgramma, which is a group of epiphytic ferns native to tropical regions. Microgramma heterophylla is further classified as a member of the order Polypodiales and the class Polypodiopsida. The family Polypodiaceae is a family of vascular plants commonly known as the polypody ferns. Microgramma heterophylla's classification reflects its evolutionary relationships with other ferns within the Polypodiaceae family.

This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its health benefits, including its ability to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing.
